allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); runs=data.get\(''''runs'''',[]\); [print\(f""{r[''''id'''']} | {r[''''status'''']} | {r[''''conclusion'''']} | {r[''''created_at'''']}""\) for r in runs[:3]]")
Bash(GH_POXY_HOST="" gh api --paginate repos/GeziP/DailyAiPodcast/actions/runs --jq '.workflow_runs[0] | {id: .id, status: .status, conclusion: .conclusion, name: .name}')
